hero.badge: Iyavikela imindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika · Mahhala ukuqala
hero.headline: Umntwana wakho uphephile ku-inthanethi. Siqinisekile ngalokho.
hero.subheadline: Kuphela kwenkundla yokuphepha yedijithali eyakhelwe imindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika. Ibuka i-WhatsApp. Ikhuluma isiZulu. Ilungile ngemizuzu emi-5.
hero.trust: Iyahambisana ne-POPIA · Akukho khadi lesikweledi elidingekayo · Khansela noma nini

problem.title: Wonke amathuluzi okuphepha omhlaba akhelwe bona. Akusiwona awakho.
problem.p1: Umntwana wakho uhlala ku-WhatsApp. Hhayi iMessage. Hhayi i-Snapchat.
problem.p2: I-Bark ibiza u-R260 ngenyanga futhi ayibuki i-WhatsApp. I-Qustodio ayikhulumi isiBhunu. I-Google Family Link ingadlulwa ngemizuzwana engu-30.
problem.p3: ISafeNet SA yakhelwe iSoweto, iStellenbosch, iPolokwane, nawo wonke umndeni ophakathi.

howItWorks.label: ISafeNet SA Isebenza Njani
howItWorks.headline: Yilungise ngemizuzu emi-5. Ukuvikelwa okuhlala njalo.
howItWorks.step1: Landa ungene ngenombolo yakho ye-SA. Ayikho iphasiwedi edingekayo.
howItWorks.step2: Skhena ikhodi ye-QR ocingweni lomntwana wakho. Imizuzwana engu-60.
howItWorks.step3: I-Luna AI ibuka ngokushesha. Izixwayiso ngolimi lwakho.

features.headline: Konke umzali waseNingizimu Afrika akudingayo
features.whatsapp: Ukubuka i-WhatsApp. Kudivayisi yomntwana wakho. Kuyimfihlo.
features.whatsappDesc: Ukuphela kwenkundla eqonda izinsongo ze-WhatsApp ngesiZulu, isiBhunu, isiSuthu nesiXhosa. Akukho okudluliselwayo. Kuphephile ku-POPIA.

cta.headline: Izigidi eziyi-3.2 zemindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika iyakudinga lokhu. Owakho ngomunye wazo.
cta.sub: Qala ukuvikela umndeni wakho namuhla. Mahhala ukuzama. Iyahambisana ne-POPIA. Ilungile ngemizuzu emi-5.

footer.description: Ingqalasizinda yokuphepha yedijithali yemindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika. Izelwe lapha. Yakhelwe lapha.

auth.phonePrompt: Faka inombolo yakho yaseNingizimu Afrika ukuze uqale
auth.verifyHint: Faka ikhodi enezinombolo eziyi-6 ethunyelwe ku-+27
auth.consentDesc: Ngaphansi koMthetho Wokuvikelwa Kolwazi Lomuntu Siqu waseNingizimu Afrika, sidinga imvume yakho kulokhu okulandelayo:
